ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "address_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user's address */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's department */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user's manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique employee identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the user */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of pay (e.g., biweekly, monthly) */,
  "next_pay_date" TEXT /* Date of the next pay period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time when the user account was last updated
Date of birth of the user
Date and time when the role was assigned
Date and time when the permission was assigned
Unique identifier for each log entry
Reference to the user who performed the action
Date and time when the action was performed
Date when the benefit becomes effective
Unique identifier for each payroll entry
Date of the next pay period
